notice: This is a fictional, browser-only ProofLine workspace. Every person, employer, role, document, and outcome is invented. Nothing is uploaded, sent, persistently saved, or generated by AI.

candidate.headline: Architecture & integration leader
candidate.target: Platform architecture and technical product leadership

jobs.title: Platform Architecture Lead
jobs.summary: Set platform direction across partner integrations and delivery teams.
jobs.gap: Cloud operations depth is useful but not required.

pack.title: Architecture-led application outline
pack.intro: Lead with the platform decision record and integration-programme evidence.
claims: Established architecture direction across multiple delivery teams.
Turned integration constraints into an explicit, reviewable platform roadmap.
Partnered with product and delivery leaders to reduce implementation risk.
pack.question: How is operational ownership shared between platform and product teams?

jobs.title: Technical Product Architect
jobs.summary: Shape product architecture for workflow automation used by enterprise teams.
jobs.gap: Commercial discovery experience should be explored in interview.

pack.title: Product-architecture application outline
pack.intro: Connect architecture decisions to product outcomes, then review the discovery claim.
claims: Framed technical choices around delivery and customer workflow outcomes.
Made integration boundaries visible to product and engineering teams.
Used governance to keep complex programmes moving.
pack.question: How do product discovery and architecture decisions meet in this role?

jobs.title: Engineering Delivery Manager
jobs.summary: Guide cross-functional delivery for a data-rich logistics platform.
jobs.gap: The role asks for direct people-management evidence.

pack.title: Delivery-leadership application outline
pack.intro: Show programme governance and address people-management scope transparently.
claims: Created delivery structure across technical dependencies.
Made architecture risk visible early in programme decisions.
Built alignment between implementation and leadership stakeholders.
pack.question: What direct line-management responsibility comes with this role?

applications.next: Review the evidence claims before sending
Decide whether to address the management gap
